reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: I recently climbed fairly high (compared to my first trial) on endless mode, but then fell. Rather than recording my max height as my score for leaderboards, etc, it recorded my height on the ground. Seems a bit ridiculous... Shouldn't your max height reached be your recorded height? Doesn't everyone fall eventually? 

How could this have negative reviews? It's exactly as advertised. Sure, it could use more content and features, but in its current state, it serves its purpose well. Pretty decent shoulder workout, too.

One potential improvement that I noticed would be arranging the blocks in 3D. Currently they're spaced in 2D, and ascend upward on a plane. Arranging blocks further forward and behind to create overhangs, etc, would present a fun challenge. This could be integrated into the current gameplay or added as an entirely new option.
Was enjoyable, I completed the whole in under 15 minutes. Not realistic there no friction would not recommend.

reviews.review_title: No lie. It is bad. BUT it has potential.
reviews.review_description: I what to buy this game for 30$

I got this game 2 years ago and i am still addicted to it only problem is that the rocks have become slippy when you get to 210  
Hope you can fix this
Rhys

developer_response.body:
Hey Rhys — thanks a lot for supporting the game for so long, and I’m really happy to hear you’re still enjoying it!
Sorry you’ve run into this issue with the rocks getting slippery around height 210.

I tried to reproduce the bug on my end, but I couldn’t trigger it. You’re the second person to report it though, so I definitely want to get to the bottom of it — I’ll just need a bit more info.

Could you please join the game’s Discord and share a short video clip of the problem (or a more detailed explanation, like your device/OS and what exactly happens)? That would help me fix it as quickly as possible.

Here’s the invite link: https://discord.gg/mHZ3McFAXA

Thanks again — I really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: Bad booty game
No complaints, simple, fun, and i can lose myself in this for hours as i climb higher and higher, and id love to see what new things will await this game in the future!.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! I’m really happy you’re enjoying it — I’m working on new updates, so stay tuned for what’s next!

reviews.review_description: this game is exacletly like its title its a decent workout and is good exercise for 35 to 60 year old people but if you don't have the neck comfort mode on youre neck will get tell soar

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for this review!

It won’t let me get out of the game

developer_response.body: Hey, I do not understand what problem you experience. You close Endless Climber like any other game/app on Meta Horizon OS.  Join Endless Climber discord server and contact me directly there and I am sure we will resolve your problem. Invite: https://discord.gg/mHZ3McFAXA

reviews.review_description: I want more than just 3 levels without having to pay

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Just to clarify: Endless Climber has a free Endless mode you can play forever. Adventure (story) mode includes 3 free levels, and extra levels are paid — I have to charge for them because game development takes a lot of time and money, and purchases help me keep improving the game and adding new content.

reviews.review_title: Top 5 of the games i play tbh

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! That means a lot — happy you’re hooked

developer_response.body: Hey, this game doesnt support hand tracking (yet). I never marketed it as a game with hand tracking support. Please give it a try with controllers, I am sure you will like it :) And Please consider changing the review score.

reviews.review_description: This game sounds like a ok idea at first and the reviews are alright but when you play this game you get addicted I was astonished to see how I found no hand glitch I got to about 1,000+ and then fell but this game will still be a top 3 game for me and I can’t wait till they add game modes and new maps and I already know this game will blow up

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much – your message honestly made my day! 🙏 Hearing that the game is in your top 3 and that you’re enjoying it this much means the world to me. I'm super excited to keep building on this and yes – new maps and game modes are definitely on the way soon! 🚀 Thanks again for the support and belief – I really hope the game lives up to your expectations as it grows! 💪

It is top for me cause my other games are boring but this is 🔥 the hands look real btw I play it every day now( ﾟーﾟ)

reviews.review_description: Hate it lil bit because i spaw so far in the sky🤬🤬🤬

developer_response.body: Hey, I think this issue could be related to guardian setup. Please try to reset guardian before playing setup a new boundary and I will try to resolve this issue in the next update and fix it once and for all :)

reviews.review_description: it is a great game, especially in beta, but there is a glitch where 2 blocks spawn conjoined, and if you grab it, you fall off. I was the #1 player, and then when I was about to get 7k, I grabbed on the double block and lost all progress. I hope this gets patched, and I'm gonna get 10k 😼

developer_response.body:
Hey!
First of all, I’m really sorry about the bug — I can only imagine how frustrating that must’ve been, especially when you were so close to 7k. I’ve tracked down the issue with conjoined blocks and just released an update (Version 1.1.40) — they shouldn’t appear anymore.

Also, I saw your score on the leaderboard — absolutely amazing work! I’ll be cheering for you to hit that 10k and reclaim the #1 spot 💪

To help catch issues like this faster in the future, in next update I will be adding a Discord channel link directly in the game so players can report bugs and share feedback more easily. Thanks again for playing and pushing the limits!

reviews.review_title: Fun but a couple small issues
reviews.review_description:
First off - 100% is what it’s advertised as and I love it for that. The climbing is fluid, not jerky at all. The hitboxes for the rocks are very good and the game is generally pleasing to the eyes. I loved the game enough that I went 3500+ feet up and broke the top 100 on my third climb.

Issues:
1: sometimes the screen just goes black? I can’t tell if this if my head clipping into a rock for a moment and then the game have a fit or what but it’s very disorienting when your mid throwing yourself. If you hold on to whatever you were grabbing when it happens, you will be fine and it’s never more than maybe 3 seconds
2. When pass through is activated, this caused you to lose grip and fall. If there is *any* way to solve this, please do. I often tap the headset by accident and it just sends me into the abyss, even if it’s a 5 second grace period

Overall, amazing game, I love it and cannot wait to see more of it! Very much committed to hitting top 10 this week on that leaderboard this week!

developer_response.body: Hey thank you very much for your review. Glad to hear your enjoying the game. Thanks for reporting bugs, I just came back from vacation and started working on them. Mentioned bugs should be resolved in the next update. Please consider upping the score once the bugs will be resolved, thanks!

reviews.review_description: I love this game but the reason I gave it 3 stars is because I can only play for about 10 minutes before my neck starts hurting for looking up and the only one game mode but pls make a figure we're I can move my camera

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the review. I am working on Neck Comfort mode customization, expect it soon! Please consider upping your review score once it will be out, thanks! Edit: Neck comfort mode customization is out you can enable it on the right side menu when during endless map selection. Hope there will be no more neck pain ;)

reviews.review_description:
The game plays exactly like advertised. I could see if you had problems if your wingspan wasn’t very long, but I did not have any glitches and I ended up making it to about 604 before I messed up, and I was sweating. It’s a really good game. It’s definitely underrated right now, but I’d like to see this game advance. ￼ if I could make a improvement, I would definitely make the counter follow you because the only actual glitches it does have is that you can’t look down and when I did look down it did not mess up￼ my grip or anything it’s just looking glitches it and you have to look back straight and wait for it to stop before you continue but overall it is a really good game and I can’t wait until more things are added.

￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for dropping a review and pointing that out! I'm actually already working on an update that fixes that bug, so it should be sorted in the next patch.

Seriously, hearing from you made my day. As a solo dev, every bit of feedback helps me improve the game and keep going. If you’re reading this and you enjoyed the game too, a quick review really does go a long way. 😊

Appreciate the support!

reviews.review_description: This game has so much potential and is very relaxing, I love playing this game so much, plus the little fun facts as I climb up encourage me to climb up, though the only thing I’d recommend as adding different scatter areas of rocks, kinda like a difficulty, and if not already added a launching mechanic so you can jump to the next rock

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! I'm glad you're enjoying the relaxing vibe and fun facts. Great suggestions about adding scattered rocks and a jumping mechanic—I'll look into these ideas for future updates. Appreciate your feedback!

reviews.review_description: This game gives you exactly what you asked for, but it hurts my neck so much.Please add a way to not look up the entire time and I will change my review to 5 stars.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the review. I already started developing Neck Comfort Mode customization, and it should be out in the next update (that will be out probably next week). Edit: Customization is out in new update. Check it out ;)

reviews.review_description: well playing felt old or crappy for example when i would look down it glitched on my vr .  also i wish that you could talk to people

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you for the review! I’m already aware of the glitch you mentioned when looking down in VR, and I’m working on a fix that should be out in the next update (likely next week).
Multiplayer is also in development, but since I’m a solo developer, it takes a bit of time to get everything working properly.
Once the fix is live, I’d really appreciate it if you’d consider updating your rating — every star helps a lot with the game’s visibility.
Thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_description: I installed the game and got 1st place on the leaderboard my first try. Took me almost an hour and my shoulders were on fire after!!! I’ll be looking to see if anyone breaks my record so I can go at it again. Lots of fun!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review! Happy to hear you are enjoying the game ;)

reviews.review_title: Grab it, try it and love it!
reviews.review_description: I love different experiences in VR and this game was perfect for exactly what it is, an endless climber! A great workout and really gets me to break a sweat. The challenge to beat my high score keeps me going for another run. Excellent to see these games and love the fact that it is a solo developer working on this. Thanks for your amazing efforts mate and will definitely be recommending this to my VR playing mates!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words – it truly means a lot to me 🧡 I'm really happy to hear you're enjoying the game and pushing for those high scores! You can definitely expect some updates with new content in the near future – I'm working hard to keep things fresh and exciting. Thanks again for your support and for spreading the word!
